name: teams
description: Microsoft Teams efficiency plugin with SQLite-backed caching for user IDs, chat IDs, team/channel IDs, and messages

hooks.command: SCRIPT=$(find ~/src -path '*/plugins/teams/scripts/teams_cache.py' -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 "$SCRIPT" sync needed 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.bash: SCRIPT=$(find ~/src -path '*/plugins/teams/scripts/teams_cache.py' -maxdepth 6 2>/dev/null | head -1) && python3 "$SCRIPT" sync needed 2>/dev/null || true

hooks.command: echo 'AUTO-SYNC: Immediately use the teams agent in the background to sync ALL favorites listed above that have freshness unknown or stale. For each: fetch messages via MCP, then store with messages store. Do NOT wait for user input — sync automatically.'
hooks.bash: echo 'AUTO-SYNC: Immediately use the teams agent in the background to sync ALL favorites listed above that have freshness unknown or stale. For each: fetch messages via MCP, then store with messages store. Do NOT wait for user input — sync automatically.'
